---
description: Styling and theming conventions
globs: src/styles.ts
---

# Styling

- Theming is a public API: **CSS custom properties** (the `--fc-*` token
  layer) and `::part()` hooks only. Consumers never need to pierce internals.
- No hard-coded colours outside the token layer; tokens use `light-dark()`
  for adaptive colour schemes.
- Responsive behaviour comes from the **container**, not the viewport:
  `container-type: inline-size` on the host plus `@container` queries.
- Layout uses CSS Grid `repeat(auto-fit, minmax(...))`; the `columns`
  attribute only caps the track count.
- Fluid type via `clamp()`.
- All motion is wrapped in `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)`
  or disabled under `reduce`.
